productDisplayName: Timberland Men Nekkol Grey Black Floater
description: Here's a performance sandal with hook-and-loop closure to ensure that you get the perfect Fit every time. timberland's Sandal isn't just for schlepping back and forth from the house to the pool - with a compression-molded EVA midsole for comfort and shock absorption and a solid rubber lug outsole that's designed expecially for traction on varied terrain, you'll be wearing these around the campsite and throughout the backcountry. These rugged sandals couldn't be easier to take on and off, and you'll appreciate the lightweight breathability of quality synthetics when you're out enjoying the wind, air and water. Upper Synthetic leather upper for lightweight protection Hook-and-loop adjustable strap closures at two points Removable ankle strap to convert the floaters into slip ons Midsole Compression molded EVA midsole provides lightweight cushioning and shock absorption Outsole Solid rubber outsole with lugs designed for superior traction on trails shoe careUse timberland leather shoe polish to keep your shoes sparkling clean
